npcs.name: Lunina
npcs.greeting: Oh, you're here! Moonlight will be so happy.

idle.text: The house feels warmer when you visit.
Have you tried exploring the garden at night?
Moonlight was humming to herself earlier. A good sign!
Every room in this house holds a little secret.
Moonlight grows so quickly. It feels like only yesterday she was a Moonbud.
If you listen carefully, the house makes its own music.

happy.text: Look at Moonlight glow! You're doing wonderfully.
She hasn't looked this happy in days!
Whatever you did — keep doing it.

sad.text: Moonlight seems a little withdrawn. Maybe she needs a cuddle?
She hasn't eaten properly today. Try the moonberry — she loves it.
Even the bravest magical girls need rest.

npcs.name: Stellina
npcs.greeting: Ooh! You're back! Can we explore the garden?

idle.text: I counted fourteen fireflies last night. A new record.
The garden has a secret corner behind the moonflower bush.
I taught Moonlight a new dance. She's a natural.
Do you think the stars remember us between visits?
The kitchen has a jar in the back cupboard. Not telling what's inside.
I think the Living Room carpet has a map hidden in the pattern.

happy.text: She's so sparkly today! Almost hard to look at.
She's been bouncing around all morning!

sad.text: She's being very quiet. Let's fix that.
Did she get enough sleep? She looks a little dim.
Moonlight needs adventures! Take her somewhere new.

npcs.name: Noctua
npcs.greeting: Hm. You've returned. The house remembered you.

idle.text: The moon has been watching. It approves.
Every stage of growth requires letting something go.
The library holds answers, but only if you ask the right questions.
A Moonkeeper is not born. She is chosen — and she chooses back.
Moonlight is more capable than she yet knows. As are you.
The magic in this house is older than the house itself.

happy.text: She shines. This is as it should be.
The house resonates when she is well. Can you hear it?
A content Moonlight makes the garden bloom faster.

sad.text: Her light dims when she is hungry or alone. Tend to her.
Magic cannot flourish in an empty vessel. She needs nourishment.
Even the moon wanes. It does not mean it has forgotten how to shine.
